presenting the Lagna decanate is Cancer and that of the Sun
Aries. So it is the lOth Rasi. Now counting 10 signs from
Leo wc come to Taurus.
For travel too this decanate is very helpful. The decanate
rising at the start of a journey must be owned, occupied and
aspected by benefics. Its form and characteristics must be
auspicious. If these conditions are satisfied the travel will be
fruitful. The Serpent and other malefic decanates should be
scrupulously avoided.
The decanate helps the astrologer in locating lost or stolen
articles. Prthuyasas states in his Salpaficasika. "If the first
decanate of a Rasi is rising, the missing article is at the gate of
' he house; if it is the second, it is inside the house: and if it is

222 FUNDAMENTALS OF ASTROLOGY
the last one, the article is behind the house." The same author
adds that the thief is to be determined from the decanate that is
rising. The forms of the various decanates have been already
noticed by us.
